title: diaxulon proliferus
side_effects: Diaxulon proliferus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness due to the plant's high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Long-term consumption of the plant can also lead to damage to the liver and kidneys, resulting in jaundice and kidney failure. In severe cases, improper use of diaxulon proliferus can cause seizures, convulsions, and even coma in susceptible individuals. It's essential to consult with a medical professional before using any plant-based remedy to avoid these and other potential side effects.
